lint-library.sh kubeconform moved into per-version render loop; validates $out per --kube-version instead of canonical $raw. Gate ==> PASS, shellcheck clean, no runtime regression (1:55 vs 1:58 baseline). Implemented by Sonnet executor via operating layer, reviewed by Fable.
CRD_CATALOG_REF pin added to lint-library.sh; full CI-strict gate ==> PASS with pinned URL (fresh downloads), shellcheck clean

Composition-level fail guard in _app.yaml + negative test in lint-library.sh + README/CHANGELOG. Gate ==> PASS, goldens byte-identical, shellcheck clean. Implemented by Sonnet executor, reviewed by Fable (secretName targets verified at _certificate.yaml:31 / _tls-selfsigned.yaml:3).

Rotation via platform/tls-not-after annotation + renewBeforeDays values key (schema/README/CHANGELOG). Implemented by Sonnet executor (template/values/docs), completed by Fable (UPDATE_GOLDEN + final gate — executor idled before those steps). Gate ==> PASS twice, golden diff = one redacted-annotation hunk, shellcheck + metaschema clean. On-cluster lookup/rotation path unverified (no cluster) — source-reasoned only.
Fixed by d1a9653 — lint-library.sh now renders and validates per-version; kubeconform runs against each k8s version's own render, not the floor render.
Fixed by 9c34617 — dead pre-floor apiVersion fallbacks pruned from _capabilities.tpl; remaining v1beta1 entries (Istio, Gateway API) are live CRD fallbacks, not dead.

serviceEndpoints + 5 zero-caller helpers + platform.util.merge + 3 dead values keys removed; PDB maxUnavailable made reachable; 3 undeclared keys declared. Goldens byte-identical across all 4 fixtures, proving the code was dead. Full gate PASS (REQUIRE_KUBECONFORM=1 REQUIRE_CHECK_JSONSCHEMA=1).

Fixed by the component-label refactor: platform.selectorLabels now emits name+instance+component and is built only from stable chart-derived values; commonLabels removed from the Service and ServiceMonitor selectors; CronJob pods are component=cronjob and hook-Job pods component=preinstall/postinstall, so the Service and PDB no longer match them. New 'selector stability' gate in lint-library.sh mutation-tested to catch regressions. Goldens regenerated; full gate PASS.

Fixed by the component-label refactor: platform.selectorLabels now emits name+instance+component and is built only from stable chart-derived values; commonLabels removed from the Service and ServiceMonitor selectors; CronJob pods are component=cronjob and hook-Job pods component=preinstall/postinstall, so the Service and PDB no longer match them. New 'selector stability' gate in lint-library.sh mutation-tested to catch regressions. Goldens regenerated; full gate PASS.

Final item done: the three undeclared values keys are now typed in values.schema.reference.json. All other acceptance items landed in earlier commits on fix/p1-render-correctness. The _service.yaml empty-ports item in the description was a misdiagnosis (see notes) and is intentionally not actioned.

Fixed via new platform.updateStrategy helper (_helpers.tpl): drops rollingUpdate whenever .type != RollingUpdate, applied at all three call sites (_deployment strategy, _statefulset/_daemonset updateStrategy). Verified: --set updateStrategy.type=Recreate renders 'strategy: {type: Recreate}' only; statefulSet/daemonSet OnDelete render no rollingUpdate/partition; RollingUpdate defaults unchanged (goldens byte-identical). New 'updateStrategy compatibility' section in lint-library.sh asserts all three negatives plus a positive guard against over-stripping; mutation-tested by restoring the toYaml passthrough (3 new assertions went RED, gate ended ==> FAIL) then reverting. Strict gate REQUIRE_KUBECONFORM=1 REQUIRE_CHECK_JSONSCHEMA=1 scripts/lint-library.sh => PASS, kubeconform clean across the version matrix.
